queries.question: Which virtual rooms have a capacity of 30 and which class rooms have the same capacity?
queries.sql:
SELECT Classrooms.Name 
FROM LearningEnvironments JOIN Classrooms ON LearningEnvironments.Environmentid = Classrooms.TypeOfEnvironment
WHERE (LearningEnvironments.Value = "Classroom" OR LearningEnvironments.Value = "Virtual Room") AND Classrooms.Capacity = 30
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?learningenvironments a :LearningEnvironments .
  ?classrooms a :Classrooms .
  ?classrooms p:hasLearningEnvironments ?learningenvironments .
  ?classrooms p:name ?name .
  ?learningenvironments p:Value ?value_w .
  ?learningenvironments p:Value ?value_w2 .
  ?classrooms p:Capacity ?capacity_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?value_w) = "Classroom" || STR(?value_w2) = "Virtual Room")) && (STR(?capacity_w) = "30" || STR(?capacity_w) = "30.0")))
}

queries.question: Display classrooms and virtual rooms with a capacity of 30.
queries.sql:
SELECT Classrooms.Name 
FROM LearningEnvironments JOIN Classrooms ON LearningEnvironments.Environmentid = Classrooms.TypeOfEnvironment
WHERE LearningEnvironments.Value = "Classroom" OR LearningEnvironments.Value = "Virtual Room" AND Classrooms.Capacity = 30
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?learningenvironments a :LearningEnvironments .
  ?classrooms a :Classrooms .
  ?classrooms p:hasLearningEnvironments ?learningenvironments .
  ?classrooms p:name ?name .
  ?learningenvironments p:Value ?value_w .
  ?learningenvironments p:Value ?value_w2 .
  ?classrooms p:Capacity ?capacity_w .
  FILTER((STR(?value_w) = "Classroom" || (STR(?value_w2) = "Virtual Room" && (STR(?capacity_w) = "30" || STR(?capacity_w) = "30.0"))))
}
